en: O foolish Galatians! Who has bewitched you? It was before your eyes that Jesus Christ was publicly portrayed as crucified.
zh: 無知的加拉太人哪！耶穌基督釘十字架，已經活現在你們眼前，誰又迷惑了你們呢？

en: Let me ask you only this: Did you receive the Spirit by works of the law or by hearing with faith?
zh: 我只想問你們這一點：你們接受了聖靈，是靠著行律法，還是因為信所聽見的福音呢？

en: Are you so foolish? Having begun by the Spirit, are you now being perfected by the flesh?
zh: 你們是這樣的無知嗎？你們既然靠著聖靈開始，現在還要靠著肉體成全嗎？

en: Did you suffer so many things in vain- if indeed it was in vain?
zh: 你們受了這麼多的苦，都是白受的嗎？恐怕真是白受的了。

en: Does he who supplies the Spirit to you and works miracles among you do so by works of the law, or by hearing with faith-
zh: 那麼， 神賜聖靈給你們，又在你們中間行神蹟，是因為你們行律法，還是因為你們信所聽見的福音呢？

en: just as Abraham "believed God, and it was counted to him as righteousness"?
zh: 正如亞伯拉罕信 神，這就算為他的義。

en: Know then that it is those of faith who are the sons of Abraham.
zh: 所以你們要知道，有信心的人，就是亞伯拉罕的子孫。

en: And the Scripture, foreseeing that God would justify the Gentiles by faith, preached the gospel beforehand to Abraham, saying, "In you shall all the nations be blessed."
zh: 聖經既然預先看見 神要使外族人因信稱義，就預先把好信息傳給亞伯拉罕：“萬國都必因你得福。”

en: So then, those who are of faith are blessed along with Abraham, the man of faith.
zh: 這樣看來，有信心的人，必定和有信心的亞伯拉罕一同得福。

en: For all who rely on works of the law are under a curse; for it is written, "Cursed be everyone who does not abide by all things written in the Book of the Law, and do them."
zh: 凡是靠行律法稱義的，都在咒詛之下，因為經上記著：“凡不常常照著律法書上所寫的一切去行的，都被咒詛。”

en: Now it is evident that no one is justified before God by the law, for "The righteous shall live by faith."
zh: 很明顯，在 神面前，沒有一個人可以靠著律法稱義，因為“義人必因信得生” 。

en: But the law is not of faith, rather "The one who does them shall live by them."
zh: 律法本來不是出於信，而是說：“遵行這些事的人，就必因這些事而活。”

en: Christ redeemed us from the curse of the law by becoming a curse for us- for it is written, "Cursed is everyone who is hanged on a tree"-
zh: 基督替我們受了咒詛，就救贖我們脫離了律法的咒詛，因為經上記著：“凡掛在木頭上的，都是受咒詛的。”

en: so that in Christ Jesus the blessing of Abraham might come to the Gentiles, so that we might receive the promised Spirit through faith.
zh: 這樣，亞伯拉罕所蒙的福，就在耶穌基督裡臨到外族人，使我們因著信，可以領受所應許的聖靈。

en: To give a human example, brothers: even with a man-made covenant, no one annuls it or adds to it once it has been ratified.
zh: 弟兄們，我照著人的常理說：一個立好了的約，雖然是人所立的，卻沒有人可以廢棄或增加。

en: Now the promises were made to Abraham and to his offspring. It does not say, "And to offsprings," referring to many, but referring to one, "And to your offspring," who is Christ.
zh: 那些應許本來是給亞伯拉罕和他的後裔的。 神並沒有說“給眾後裔”，好像指著多數；而是說“給你的一個後裔”，指著一個，就是基督。

en: This is what I mean: the law, which came 430 years afterward, does not annul a covenant previously ratified by God, so as to make the promise void.
zh: 我要這樣說， 神預先立好的約，那四百三十年後才有的律法，不能把它廢掉，使那應許落空。

en: For if the inheritance comes by the law, it no longer comes by promise; but God gave it to Abraham by a promise.
zh: 因為所承受的，如果是出於律法，就不是出於應許；但 神是憑著應許賜給了亞伯拉罕。

en: Why then the law? It was added because of transgressions, until the offspring should come to whom the promise had been made, and it was put in place through angels by an intermediary.
zh: 那麼，為甚麼要有律法呢？是為了過犯的緣故才加上的，直到那得應許的後裔來到。律法是藉著天使經中保的手設立的；

en: Now an intermediary implies more than one, but God is one.
zh: 中保不是為單方面的，但 神卻是一位。

en: Is the law then contrary to the promises of God? Certainly not! For if a law had been given that could give life, then righteousness would indeed be by the law.
zh: 這樣，律法和 神的應許是對立的嗎？絕對不是。如果所賜下的律法能使人得生命，義就真的是出於律法了。

en: But the Scripture imprisoned everything under sin, so that the promise by faith in Jesus Christ might be given to those who believe.
zh: 但聖經把所有的人都圈在罪中，好把那因信耶穌基督而來的應許，賜給相信的人。

en: Now before faith came, we were held captive under the law, imprisoned until the coming faith would be revealed.
zh: 但信的道理還沒有來到以前，我們在律法下被囚禁、被圍困，直到那要來的信的道理顯明出來。

en: So then, the law was our guardian until Christ came, in order that we might be justified by faith.
zh: 這樣，律法成了我們的啟蒙教師，領我們到基督那裡，使我們可以因信稱義。

en: But now that faith has come, we are no longer under a guardian,
zh: 但信的道理既然來到，我們就不再在啟蒙教師之下了。

en: for in Christ Jesus you are all sons of God, through faith.
zh: 你們因著信，在基督耶穌裡都作了 神的兒子。

en: For as many of you as were baptized into Christ have put on Christ.
zh: 你們所有受洗歸入基督的人，都是披戴基督的，

en: There is neither Jew nor Greek, there is neither slave nor free, there is neither male nor female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.
zh: 並不分猶太人或希臘人，作奴僕的或自由人，男的或女的，因為你們在基督耶穌裡都成為一體了。

en: And if you are Christ's, then you are Abraham's offspring, heirs according to promise.
zh: 如果你們屬於基督，就是亞伯拉罕的後裔，是按照應許承受產業的了。
